args:
set -eu
backend_json=$(mktemp)
cache_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json --backend-family cuda-graphs --readiness performance > "$backend_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json --cache-namespace flashinfer-autotune-cache --readiness correctness > "$cache_json"
python3 - "$backend_json" "$cache_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
backend = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
cache = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
assert [r['name'] for r in backend['plan']['compile_regions']] == ['decode_attention']
assert [r['name'] for r in cache['plan']['compile_regions']] == ['kv_cache_update']
assert backend['verification']['status'] == 'Passed'
assert cache['verification']['status'] == 'Passed'
assert any(d['code'] == 'residual_runtime_compile_risk' for d in backend['diagnostics']['diagnostics'])
assert any(d['code'] == 'residual_runtime_compile_risk' for d in cache['diagnostics']['diagnostics'])
PY
printf 'explain-invalid-scope\n'
